steps.title: Separate the sentences
steps.content: The first idea gives the Kyzylkum Desert as an example of a semiarid desert. The next idea adds that, with its large area, it is also one of the largest deserts of any type. These ideas need a clean sentence boundary.

steps.title: Avoid faulty joining
steps.content: A runs the ideas together without punctuation. B creates awkward coordination after "for example." C uses only a comma where a stronger break is needed. A period after "example" correctly starts the next sentence. The answer is D.
